chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 397 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.1994/2020 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 05.12.2023 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Assistant Attorney General has filed comments on behalf of respondents No.2 and 3. None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Case history shows that none has been appearing quite for some time. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
